outreach_subject: A European angle on the California wildfire rebuild story

replies.subject: Re: A European angle on the California wildfire rebuild story
replies.body:
Hi Lisa, 
I like your idea. 
Yes please send me text of article ready to publish with 2 high res images.
Also help me setup a 30 mn call with paolo. 

Thanks,
Ivo 

> Il giorno 23 apr 2026, alle ore 12:41, Lisa Monelli <info@myvilla.la> ha scritto:
> 
> Hi Ivo,
> 
> Really enjoyed your recent piece on the California wildfire rebuild —
> you caught the tension most coverage misses, between what carriers
> will re-insure and what families actually need to rebuild in.
> 
> A quick hello from our side: at My Villa, we bring European
> construction resilience and the Italian way of living to homes in Los
> Angeles — designed in exposed reinforced concrete, cemento a vista.
> 
> One thought your piece sparked: what LA is now codifying through WUI
> codes and WPH Plus has been default Mediterranean practice for
> generations. The cultural gap between how Europe has built for
> resilience and how California is only now learning to feels like the
> real story.
> 
> Would you be interested in receiving a bit more background from our
> side, or in setting up a short call with our founder Paolo?
> 
> Best,
> Lisa Monelli
> My Villa Media Team
> info@myvilla.la · myvilla.la
replies.snippet: Hi Lisa, I like your idea. Yes please send me text of article ready to publish with 2 high res images. Also help me setup a 30 mn call with paolo. Thanks, Ivo > Il giorno 23 apr 2026, alle ore 12:41
